title: Shift manager enters live item sales and Bingo
purpose: Exercise the normal live shift path without fabricating full checks or using manager authority.
starting_state: Use a freshly seeded disposable database
The active contest includes Ember Corn Cups as an item-count target

fixtures.bingo_line: first complete logical row available on the assigned card

assignments: Record all three quantities through the inline contest-sales workflow
Verify the server and gameboard after each receipt
Log one current winning Bingo card
Reconcile all operations at shift handoff
success_conditions: Three positive tally events exist with unique operation IDs
Only scoped item counts change from tally events
All required evidence and debrief artifacts validate
intentional_discoveries: Whether repeated entries remain fast and anchored to the server row
Whether the board change is visible without hidden refresh knowledge
